meaning: 罗萨里奥[阿根廷东部港市]
examples: In Rosario they seemed equally determined.
Del Rosario said the drugs threw her into a deep depression. She started having panic attacks.
Next to Gler stood Catherine Del Rosario, a 27-year-old interior designer who had TB meningitis.
Growing up on a farm, Rosario was just five years old when he started riding horses.
And to think, the 5-foot-2 Rosario didn't even know about horse racing until he was 11.
